scripts.allure:report: npm run prepare:allure && allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report
scripts.test:nonapi:sequential: npx playwright test tests/footerTest.spec.js && npx playwright test tests/loginInvalidTest.spec.js && npx playwright test tests/loginTest.spec.js
scripts.report: npm run test && npm run allure:report
